description: Release-layer label selection. This is intentionally separate from discovered_label_catalog.json. Keep this file small and editable as product decisions evolve.
notes: This v1 release intentionally favors common fridge items with stable visual boundaries and direct FoodKeeper alignment.
See docs/labels/release_v1_selection_rationale.md for the selection criteria and per-label rationale.
Labels kept out of v1 should remain in the discovery catalog for later release waves.
See docs/labels/release_v1_expansion_plan.md for the staged follow-up expansion shortlist.
